subject: Fwd: Nature Top 20 of 2007
body:
jeffrey,
great news!
m



Begin forwarded message:

From: "Erez Lieberman" <erez@erez.com>
Date: January 2, 2008 10:42:47 PM EST
To: "JB Michel" <jb.michel@gmail.com>, "Martin Nowak" <nowak@fas.harvard.edu>, "Tina Yue Tang" <tinatang@fas.harvard.edu>, "Joe Jackson" <josephgarfieldjackson@gmail.com>, "Jonathan Saragosti" <jonathan.saragosti@gmail.com>
Subject: Nature Top 20 of 2007

Hey all -

Amazing news!

Nature has included the verbs paper in its list of the Nature Editor's favorite papers of 2007, a list of only 18 papers which includes things like the conversion of light waves to matter waves, the European Space Agency's Venus Express mission which has been orbiting Venus for over a year, the reprogramming of differentiated cells to stem cells in primates, and a whole bunch of other incredible work.

It is a tremendous honor for our "unusual" paper to be included.

Congrats all around!

-Erez
￼
